title: Manufacturing Engineer - LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions:
LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions!
